0.response: {"Q0":"My only strategy was to avoid the blue planet after the blue astronaut left, and when the gems or rocks were covered in green, I chose them a little less frequently"}

7.response: {"Q0":"Usually I picked the one with the longer yellow bar/better probability, but sometimes I picked the higher dollar amount even if its probability was slightly less"}

9.response: {"Q0":"The instructions were clear, but I think they could have been presented a little more concisely/on fewer pages"}

1.response: {"Q0":"My strategy only changed depending on what the game provided (like when the astronaut left or if I saw the gem/rock covered in green)"}

2.response: {"Q0":"There were times where I seemed to find more gems on the red planet and sometimes more gems on the blue planet. I didn't really see a pattern here."}

8.response: {"Q0":"I think I was equally focused on both"}

11.response: {"Q0":"Thank you for the opportunity to take part - it was fun"}
